source_rationale: CD69 is a canonical early T cell activation marker expressed on the surface of recently activated lymphocytes
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine produced by activated T cells involved in immune cell recruitment
Granzyme B is a serine protease expressed by activated cytotoxic T cells and NK cells mediating target cell apoptosis
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T cells critical for immune activation
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on activated T cells and is important for T cell survival and homeostasis
CD3E is a core component of the T cell receptor complex, confirming T cell identity
KLRB1 (CD161) is expressed on activated T cells and NK-T cells, marking effector populations
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule-associated protein expressed in activated T cells and NK cells
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker essential for T cell receptor signaling
TFAP2B is a transcription factor essential for amacrine cell fate specification in the retina
TFAP2A is a key transcription factor required for amacrine cell differentiation
GAD1 (glutamic acid decarboxylase) is the enzyme synthesizing GABA, marking GABAergic amacrine cells
PAX6 is a master eye development transcription factor highly expressed in amacrine cells
GAD2 is the second GABA-synthesizing enzyme, further confirming GABAergic amacrine identity
SLC6A1 is the GABA transporter expressed in GABAergic amacrine cells for neurotransmitter reuptake
CARTPT (CART prepropeptide) is a neuropeptide marking specific amacrine cell subtypes in the retina
SCG2 (secretogranin II) is a neuroendocrine secretory granule protein expressed in amacrine cells
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis
DARC (ACKR1/Duffy antigen) is highly expressed on choroidal endothelial cells and postcapillary venules
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein characteristic of endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor important for vascular development
ESAM (endothelial cell-selective adhesion molecule) is a junctional protein specific to endothelial cells
Endomucin is a sialomucin expressed on the luminal surface of endothelial cells
E-selectin is an endothelial adhesion molecule involved in leukocyte recruitment
PTPRB (VE-PTP) is an endothelial-specific receptor phosphatase regulating vascular integrity
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens/ciliary body crystallin highly expressed in ciliary epithelium
Beta-crystallin B2 is expressed in the ciliary body epithelium reflecting its lens-like properties
Aquaporin 1 is a water channel critical for aqueous humor production in the ciliary body
CXCL14 is a chemokine highly expressed in ciliary body epithelium
Alpha-crystallin B is a small heat shock protein abundantly expressed in ciliary body cells
Sarcolipin is expressed in ciliary body cells and regulates calcium handling
FOXE3 is a forkhead transcription factor involved in lens and anterior segment development
PAX6 is a master regulator of eye development expressed in ciliary body epithelium
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein characteristic of endothelial cells
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial marker confirming vascular identity
TM4SF1 is a transmembrane protein enriched in endothelial cells involved in angiogenesis

SPARCL1 (hevin) is highly expressed in endothelial cells of the ciliary body vasculature
S1PR1 is a sphingosine-1-phosphate receptor critical for endothelial cell function and vascular integrity
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor involved in vascular tube formation
COL9A1 is a collagen type IX alpha chain that defines this ciliary body cell subtype

CPAMD8 is associated with anterior segment development and is highly expressed in ciliary body
TRPM3 is a cation channel expressed in ciliary body epithelium involved in ion transport
DAPL1 is a death-associated protein expressed in ciliary body epithelial cells
PAX6 is a master eye transcription factor expressed in ciliary body epithelium
Aquaporin 1 mediates water transport in ciliary body for aqueous humor production
Arrestin 3 (cone arrestin) is a canonical cone photoreceptor marker involved in phototransduction
OPN1LW is the long-wave sensitive cone opsin, a definitive cone photoreceptor marker
PDE6H is the cone-specific phosphodiesterase inhibitory subunit essential for cone phototransduction

GNB3 is the cone-specific transducin beta subunit involved in cone phototransduction
GRK7 is a cone-specific G protein-coupled receptor kinase that phosphorylates cone opsins
SLC24A2 is a cone photoreceptor sodium/calcium exchanger important for calcium homeostasis
KRT13 is a cytokeratin characteristic of non-keratinized stratified squamous epithelium including conjunctiva

DSG3 (desmoglein 3) is a desmosomal cadherin expressed in stratified squamous epithelium

IL1RN (IL-1 receptor antagonist) is highly expressed in mucosal epithelial cells of the conjunctiva

KRT15 marks limbal/corneal progenitor-associated fibroblasts in the corneal stroma

SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor expressed by corneal stromal fibroblasts
Alpha-crystallin A is the defining marker of this ciliary body cell subtype with high crystallin expression
Beta-crystallin B2 is co-expressed with CRYAA in this lens-like ciliary body cell population

FOXE3 is a lens/anterior segment transcription factor expressed in crystallin-high ciliary cells

Sarcolipin is expressed in ciliary body cells and helps distinguish this subpopulation

S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical monocyte marker forming the calprotectin complex

DCT (dopachrome tautomerase) indicates melanin production in pigmented ciliary epithelium
